---
title: "Metrics available in the vectormetrics package"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Metrics available in the vectormetrics package}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
#| echo: false
library(vectormetrics)
knitr::kable(vm_metrics)
```
